title: Does Support answer emails?
excerpt:
I have sent several messages to support and was encouraged to do so in one of the live trainings I attended. 
They haven’t responded to any of my messages.

posts.author: Jody (Jody Poland)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have sent several messages to support and was encouraged to do so in one of the live trainings I attended.

They haven’t responded to any of my messages.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml: I have had very good success just emailing support@monday.com

posts.author: Jody (Jody Poland)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks. I have sent 3-4 messages since we opened our account. I haven’t received any response.

posts.author: TheOtherPM (Paul McGregor)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you checked your spam? @Jody they are usually pretty awesome at responding

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Jody FYI, I usually receive replies from support@monday.com within 1-2 hours.

It’s unusual that you’ve received no replies to 4 messages if you sent them to the support email.

posts.author: Jody (Jody Poland)
posts.cookedHtml: I have and they are not there. Is there anyway to tag them here? This is a disappointing onboarding experience.

posts.author: anon34162818 (anon34162818)
posts.cookedHtml: We have always experienced lightning quick responses, they actually fixed a glitch I reported in 1-2 days and took the time to let me know once complete. Something must be wrong…keep trying.

posts.author: Jody (Jody Poland)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you @Aksalano. It did take a couple of days, but I started getting responses now and they are timely.

posts.author: OmerZ (Omer)
posts.cookedHtml: When emailing support I always received a response within minutes, sometime several hours. But never a day or more.
